calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-05-2005 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 225. Proceedings reported by: Sonia Wong, CSR#11288. (212)

Minor'S Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar Jun-17-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Kathy Kollehner.
Vonnah Brillet, Esq. for Petitioner: Teresa Rutherford, present as Guardian at litem for: Christopher Rutherford, a minor Claimant, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
Attorney's Fees $1,250.00
A net balance of $3,750.00 to be deposited into a blocked account with Wells Fargo Bank, West Portal, San Francisco, CA., no withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Counsel to prepare Orders.

Order Approving Compromise of Claim and Order to Deposit Money Into Blocked Account signed.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-28-2005 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-28-2005 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Aug-02-05 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-23-2004 Set For Trial On May-23-05 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On May-05-05 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 318

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-19-2004 Set For Order To Show Cause On Dec-06-04 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Notice Of Motion To Set Aside Sanctions
Off Calendar Oct-28-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff's Motion to Set Aside Sanctions issued on 9/21/2004 to Craig K. Martin, Esq., in the amount of $200.00 is heard this day. There being no appearance or an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Motion is ordered granted. Sanctions are ordered vacated. Order signed. Proceedings reported by: Brenda Fields. (212)

MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $200.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is ordered off calendar. Proceedings reported by : Leticia Perez (212)
